configurations.name: wooshbiz
runtimeArgs: require('http').createServer((req, res) => { const fs = require('fs'); const path = require('path'); let file = req.url === '/' ? '/index.html' : req.url; const fullPath = __dirname + file; try { const content = fs.readFileSync(fullPath, 'utf8'); res.writeHead(200, {'Content-Type': file.endsWith('.html') ? 'text/html' : 'text/plain'}); res.end(content); } catch(e) { res.writeHead(404); res.end('Not found'); } }).listen(8000, () => console.log('Server running on http://localhost:8000'))
